name: Hennessy Capital Acquisition Corp. II
description: Hennessy Capital Acquisition Corp. II was a blank check company formed for the purpose of entering into a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focused on target businesses in the industrial manufacturing, distribution, and services sectors in the United States. It successfully completed its business combination with Daseke, Inc., a leading consolidator and the largest owner of flatbed and specialized transportation and logistics solutions in North America.
